raw.objective: “to determine first whether there was a clear relationship between the concentration of the active metabolite of oxcarbazepine (OXC), 10-hydroxycarbamazepine (OHC) and dose adjusted for weight, and second, whether the clearance of OHC was influenced by comedication with EIAEDs”
raw.covariates: Tested: AGE WT, SEX, comedications Included: WT, inducers on CL; WT on Vd
raw.observations: Variability on CL decreased from 42 to 27.7 % with relatively simple model. GOF plots look good. Coadministration of enzyme inducing AEDs increased OXC CL by 31.2%
raw.structure: 1 compartment with linear absorption and elimination
raw.equations: Ka=theta1 CL/F=theta2*((WT/62.8)**theta4)*(1+theta5*EIAED)*exp(eta1) Vd/F=theta3*(WT/62.8) Cobs=Cipred*(1+eps1)+eps2 EIAED: coadministration of at least one enzyme-inducing AED such as PHT, PHB, or CBZ (yes=1, no=0)
raw.parameter_values: theta1=0.598 theta2=2.13 theta3=49 theta4=0.666 theta5=0.312 omega1=0.0767 sigma1=0.0571 sigma2=2.83

extraction_target.title: Drug interaction and pharmacokinetic modeling of oxcarbazepine in korean patients with epilepsy.

structural_model.description: 1 compartment with linear absorption and elimination

omega.conversion: Appendix NONMEM-scale OMEGA value retained verbatim; source-paper verification pending

sigma.conversion: Appendix NONMEM-scale SIGMA value retained verbatim; source-paper verification pending
Appendix NONMEM-scale SIGMA value retained verbatim; source-paper verification pending

extraction_target.residual_error: Ka=theta1 CL/F=theta2*((WT/62.8)**theta4)*(1+theta5*EIAED)*exp(eta1) Vd/F=theta3*(WT/62.8) Cobs=Cipred*(1+eps1)+eps2 EIAED: coadministration of at least one enzyme-inducing AED such as PHT, PHB, or CBZ (yes=1, no=0)
extraction_target.notes: Appendix-derived silver reference; compare with the publication before promotion to a gold tier.

study.objective: “to determine first whether there was a clear relationship between the concentration of the active metabolite of oxcarbazepine (OXC), 10-hydroxycarbamazepine (OHC) and dose adjusted for weight, and second, whether the clearance of OHC was influenced by comedication with EIAEDs”

covariates.raw: Tested: AGE WT, SEX, comedications Included: WT, inducers on CL; WT on Vd

normalization.omega: Values labelled OMEGA in the appendix are retained as NONMEM variances; no CV reconversion is applied.
normalization.eta: ETA distribution is inferred only when the appendix equation explicitly uses exp(ETA) or additive ETA.
normalization.source_text: The appendix row is preserved verbatim in raw; normalized fields never replace it.
